user_query: We need to add streaming support to the POST /v1/run endpoint. Currently the route in apps/worker/src/routes/run.ts buffers the entire agent response before returning it, which causes timeouts for long-running tasks. Refactor the route to stream agent output as Server-Sent Events (SSE): each tool call result and each model text delta should be emitted as a separate 'data: ...' event, with a final 'data: [DONE]' event when the run completes. Use a TransformStream to pipe events to the response. Update or add tests in apps/worker/src/routes/run.test.ts to verify the SSE content-type header and that [DONE] is emitted. Run the tests to confirm all pass.
